ab: na palolon yaten no sinsi a mangey do takey.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: maniring si ina am yaroo do takey o manongit.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: na palolon yaten no sinsi a mangey do kowran.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: tamo mangey mangavas?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: tamo mangey do jino?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: na palolon yaten no sinsi a mangey do oyo.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: tamo mangey do jino siciaro oy ya?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: na palolon yaten no sinsi a mangey do takey.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: tamo mangey do oyo siciarow ya?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: beken, na palolon yaten no sinsi a mangey do takey.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: tamo mangey do takey siciaro oy ya?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: beken, tamo mangey do kowran.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: mo sinsi, ikongo tamo mangey citahen do oyo?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: tamo mangey manita so poney.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: mo sinsi, ikongo tamo mangey citahen do takey?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: tamo mangey manita so pahapahad no anito.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: tamo mangey jino do kowran?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: tamo mangey citahen o ko nimowa tomozokosi.
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米。
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields.

ab: mo sinsi, tamo mangey meyyawawat do oyo?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: beken, tamo mangey manita so poney.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: mo sinsi, tamo mangey meymowa so napa do kowran?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: tamo mangey pey valyaten o tana.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: yamya do dang so yatomelem a poney.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: ko kapaka citapa so yamaviey a poney.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: yamyan dang so ya tomelem ma pahapahad no anito.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: wa! ko ikakza o pahapahad no anito, tayapiyatao.
en: Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: do dang am na yanan no yamey sina sina oli a pahapahad no anito.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: ori am tapipi, beken na pahapahad no anito.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: ji kangey do teymarai, tomo nita dojya!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: noon, namen jyangey do yatey marai.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: makapyaka mangonong, tamalektekka, ji ka malayo.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: ko meybezbez a tomitasya.
en: I want to see them right away.
